Lapidacao.title: Lapidação: The Ultimate Hair Schedule
Lapidacao.description: A 4-step journey that transforms the health of your hair. From deep cleansing to absolute sealing, each stage was designed with nanoprocessed technology for immediate results.

step1.title: 1. Cleanse
step1.description: Removal of impurities without damaging the hair fiber.

step2.title: 2. Seal
step2.description: Cuticle preparation to receive the treatment.

step3.title: 3. Reconstruct
step3.description: Replacement of lost mass and keratin.

PrivateLabel.title: Private Label: Your Cosmetic Brand Starts Here
PrivateLabel.description: Turn your vision into reality with our cutting-edge infrastructure. We offer in-house manufacturing, exclusive formula development, and full support to create your premium line with Diamante quality.

FinalCTA.title: Ready to Transform Your Experience?
FinalCTA.description: Whether you are a professional seeking peak performance or an entrepreneur starting your own brand, Diamante is your next step.
